items.title: Boeing (BA) Successfully Demonstrates Autonomous MQ-28 Ghost Bat With Royal Australian Air Force
items.description: Boeing (BA) recently showcased its innovative prowess with the successful completion of operational demonstrations of the MQ-28 Ghost Bat aircraft, enhancing expectations for its future contributions to unmanned flight teaming capabilities. Over the last quarter, Boeing’s stock saw an 8.92% rise, a move potentially bolstered by these demonstrations alongside robust client announcements, such as significant orders from WestJet, Macquarie AirFinance, and Korean Air. While broader economic...
